compiled_state.title: Retro 2026-04-16: Observability — structured logging and event aggregation
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Observability scored 3/5. No centralized structured logging framework. Hook error logging inconsistent across 36 enforcement hooks. No test/hook lifecycle event aggregation. Review stats (review-stats.py) works for reviews but no equivalent for tests or hooks.
